programme.title: Gaither Gospel Hour
programme.desc: Artists Amy Grant, Michael W. Smith, Steven Curtis Chapman, Sandi Patty, Larnelle Harris, The Imperials, Newsboys, Petra, 4HIM, Nicole C. Mullen and many more reunite for a night of music on stage, capturing 45 hit songs from the past four decades.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: When pride takes over, it can bring us down fast; Joyce says humility opens the door for God's promotion and lasting honor in our lives.

programme.title: David Jeremiah
programme.desc: Biblical insights and strategies for dealing with today's financial world.

programme.title: Praise
programme.desc: Matt Crouch hosts Reza Safa.

programme.title: Main Stage
programme.desc: The Kingdom Heirs; the Jim Brady Trio; the Collingsworth Family; Jason Crabb; the Isaacs.

programme.title: Jesus: The Game Changer
programme.desc: Karl Faase travels to the U.K., U.S., Singapore, India and Australia, interviewing authors, academics and modern-day game changers about how the life and teaching of Jesus changed the world and why it matters.

programme.title: Insights -- Israel and the Middle East
programme.sub-title: By Wise Counsel Thou Shalt Make War
programme.desc: Exploring the discoveries that support the Bible and help to understand the past.

programme.title: Signs & Secrets of the Messiah with Rabbi Jason Sobel
programme.sub-title: The Signs and Secrets of Multiplication (Part 1)
programme.desc: A journey into the feeding of 5,000; a story of multiplication experienced firsthand.

programme.title: Praise
programme.desc: Matt and Laurie Crouch host Dr. Steven C. Meyer from Los Angeles.

programme.title: Hagee Ministries
programme.desc: The mission of John Hagee Ministries is to take the Gospel to all the world and to all generations.

programme.title: Turning Point With Dr. David Jeremiah
programme.sub-title: A Theological Prophecy - The Falling Away
programme.desc: Strategies for guarding against apostasy.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Godly righteousness is the very opposite of self-righteousness; Joyce explains both types of righteousness and shares the benefits of understanding the difference.

programme.title: Steven Furtick
programme.desc: From Elevation Church in Charlotte, N.C., Pastor Steven Furtick offers inspirational messages through his sermons.

programme.title: Joseph Prince
programme.sub-title: Healing: The Next Great Gift After Salvation
programme.desc: Don't settle for half the gift: Joseph says Jesus paid for your salvation as well as healing at the cross!

programme.title: Robert Jeffress
programme.desc: The teaching ministry of American Southern Baptist pastor and television host, Robert Jeffress. He is a senior minister of the First Baptist Church in Dallas as well as a Fox News contributor.

programme.title: Life Today With James Robison
programme.desc: The co-authors of "Gospel Zero" examine what God says about believers to dispel the wrongful notions of who we really are.

programme.title: The Supernatural Now
programme.desc: Apostle Guillermo Maldonado is the Sr. Pastor and founder of King Jesus International Ministry (Ministerio Internacional El Rey Jesus), considered one of the fastest growing multicultural churches in the United States.

programme.title: Rick Renner
programme.desc: Rick Renner's in-depth Bible teachings, using the Greek text, help listeners gain new insight from God's Word.

programme.title: Ron Carpenter
programme.desc: Ron Carpenter leads the Body of Christ to a new level and reaches out to the lost and hurting.

programme.title: Andrew Wommack: Gospel Truth
programme.sub-title: Welcome to Your Place Called There: Episode 6
programme.desc: Andrew teaches that God provides for you in the place to which He calls you, not where you currently are; he typically blesses us one step at a time.

programme.title: Better Together
